home_subtitle: Keep your likes and dislikes updated so recommendations can adapt to your taste.
preferences_likes_placeholder: Foods you like (one per line or comma-separated)
preferences_dislikes_placeholder: Foods you dislike (one per line or comma-separated)
session_new_hint: Upload menu photos first. The session will be created automatically when parsing starts.
session_picker_hint: Use clear images of the menu. You can upload up to 10 files at once.
session_drop_hint: Release the files to attach them to this session.
session_only_images_error: Only image files are supported here.
session_parsing_timeout_warning: Parsing is taking longer than expected. You can retry with clearer images.
session_parsing_failed_warning: Parsing failed. Please re-upload clearer images and try again.
review_edit_hint: Edit, remove or add items, then confirm.
review_no_items_detected: No dishes were detected from your images. Add items manually below, then confirm.
review_duplicate_entries_warning: Duplicate or empty entries will be removed before confirmation.
recommendations_empty: No recommendations yet. Confirm the menu to get suggestions.
recommendations_timeout: Recommendations are taking longer than expected. You can go back and try again later.
recommendations_pending_manual: Recommendations are being generated in the background.
recommendations_auto_refresh_hint: This page refreshes automatically every 15 seconds for the first 3 minutes.
recommendations_manual_only_hint: If nothing appears after that, click Refresh to check again.
recommendations_manual_refresh_hint: Click Refresh to queue another attempt.
sessions_subtitle: Review every saved menu session, inspect the parsed and confirmed dishes, and update ratings from one place.
sessions_empty: You do not have any saved menu sessions yet.
sessions_delete_warning: This removes the session and its uploaded menu images. Dish ratings stay in your history.
